changeSet.author: nulogic
changeSet.comment: Create feature_flags table for tenant-level feature toggles

changeSet.author: nulogic
changeSet.comment: Seed default feature flags for demo tenant
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO feature_flags (id, tenant_id, feature_key, feature_name, description, enabled, category, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.id, 'enable_projects', 'Projects Module', 'Enable project management features', true, 'PROJECTS', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feature_flags f WHERE f.tenant_id = t.id AND f.feature_key = 'enable_projects' );

INSERT INTO feature_flags (id, tenant_id, feature_key, feature_name, description, enabled, category, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.id, 'enable_timesheets', 'Timesheets', 'Enable timesheet tracking', true, 'PROJECTS', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feature_flags f WHERE f.tenant_id = t.id AND f.feature_key = 'enable_timesheets' );

INSERT INTO feature_flags (id, tenant_id, feature_key, feature_name, description, enabled, category, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.id, 'enable_payroll', 'Payroll', 'Enable payroll processing', true, 'HRMS', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feature_flags f WHERE f.tenant_id = t.id AND f.feature_key = 'enable_payroll' );

INSERT INTO feature_flags (id, tenant_id, feature_key, feature_name, description, enabled, category, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.id, 'enable_performance', 'Performance Management', 'Enable performance reviews and goals', true, 'HRMS', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feature_flags f WHERE f.tenant_id = t.id AND f.feature_key = 'enable_performance' );

INSERT INTO feature_flags (id, tenant_id, feature_key, feature_name, description, enabled, category, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.id, 'enable_documents', 'Documents', 'Enable document management', true, 'HRMS', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM feature_flags f WHERE f.tenant_id = t.id AND f.feature_key = 'enable_documents' );
